title: The Haunting of the Winchester Mystery House

scenes.text: A mansion with stairs leading to nowhere and doors opening into walls.
The Winchester Mystery House is located in San Jose, California, known for its architectural oddities.
Built continuously for 38 years, its design is a puzzle with no clear purpose.
Was it a refuge from spirits, or simply quirky design choices?
scenes.label: REFUGE OR FANTASY?

scenes.text: Follow for a new mystery every day.

description: 📍 San Jose, USA - Ongoing. The Winchester Mystery House is a testament to peculiar architecture and the mysteries it fosters. Follow for daily mysteries!
